name: Transcoding Policy
description: Applies narrowly scoped transcoding rules before Jellyfin chooses a hardware output encoder. The default rule works around VideoToolbox failures for MPEG-2 Live TV by using libx264 while leaving other transcodes unchanged.
overview: Selectively force software encoding for matching transcodes.

versions.changelog: Load the embedded Harmony runtime from a non-collectible assembly context so the policy patch can install under Jellyfin 10.11.11's collectible plugin loader. The release package no longer ships a standalone 0Harmony.dll.

name: Commercial Skipper
description: Runs an external Comskip executable against completed recordings and publishes native Jellyfin Commercial media segments without modifying the media file.
overview: Detect commercials in DVR recordings with Comskip.

versions.changelog: Replace opaque [object Response] Comskip test failures with structured diagnostics for missing executables, invalid INI paths, timeouts, and process failures. Test the form's current paths and recognize Comskip's expected exit code 2 help response.

Fix dynamic library labels, paths, status, and detector messages rendering as JavaScript source in Jellyfin Web. Build dynamic library rows with safe DOM text nodes and add embedded-page regression coverage.
Fix Jellyfin 10.11.11 startup by removing a circular dependency between the commercial segment provider and the recordings manager. Add an isolated Jellyfin startup regression check.
Initial release with DVR library discovery, coordinated Comskip analysis, native Jellyfin Commercial segments, scheduled reconciliation, and admin controls.

name: Recording Transcoder
description: Transactionally replaces completed raw DVR transport streams with validated AV1, HEVC, or H.264 from Jellyfin FFmpeg while preserving recording paths.
overview: Safely recompress completed DVR recordings with Jellyfin FFmpeg.

versions.changelog: Fix dynamic library labels, paths, status, capability details, and encoder messages rendering as JavaScript source in Jellyfin Web. Build dynamic library rows with safe DOM text nodes and add embedded-page regression coverage.

Initial release with cross-platform Jellyfin hardware settings, verified software fallback, transactional recording replacement, stream and caption validation, crash recovery, and coordinated commercial scans.
